headline: Carnival and Norwegian Cruise Line Fall 4%: Fuel Costs Are Winning the Battle Against Booking Strength
summary: Carnival Corporation (NYSE:CCL) stock retreated 4% in Thursday’s session, trading below $26 after opening at $26.58. Meanwhile, Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) stock also sank 4%, changing hands at less than $19. Both moves come on the last trading session before Good Friday, when the markets close for the holiday. The selling pressure reflects a sector-wide ... headline: Activist Board Revamp And Norwegian Luna Launch Could Be A Game Changer For Norwegian Cruise Line (NCLH)
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings recently overhauled its board after reaching a cooperation agreement with activist investor Elliott Investment Management and, on March 27, 2026, christened its newest Prima-class ship, Norwegian Luna, in Miami ahead of a year-long schedule of Caribbean sailings. The combination of activist-driven governance changes and the launch of Norwegian Luna, with its multigenerational amenities and enhanced private-island offerings, could influence how the company...
